gui.banksystem.setting_screen.title: Bank Settings
gui.banksystem.ask_popup.title: Ask Popup
gui.banksystem.setting_screen.ask_remove:
Are you sure you want to remove this item from the bank?
This will remove the item from all players bank accounts!
This action cannot be undone!
gui.banksystem.setting_screen.ask_item_f: Whats the smallest possible unit of this item that can be stored in the bank.

In the bank you can store items in fractions. Money for example gets stored in cents.
That means the smallest unit of money that can be stored in the bank is 0.01.
For items that are not money, you can set the smallest unit that can be stored in the bank.
gui.banksystem.bank_account_management_i:
Removes the bank for this
item on the player's account.
The player will lose the items.

Moves the locked
balance to the normal balance,
making it available again for the player.
Changes the amount in the player's item bank.

Amount that is freely available
for the player to use.

Amount that is locked
for a pending transaction.

Sum of the freely available and locked balance.
Total capital of the player for this item.

Are you sure you want to remove this account for {item_name}?
The bankaccount {account_number} will lose all {item_name} in the account!
This action cannot be undone!
gui.banksystem.bank_account_management_s:
Do you realy want to delete the bank account
"{account_number}"?
All items will be lost.
gui.banksystem.bank_download_screen.bank: The current balance in the connected bank account
gui.banksystem.bank_download_screen.targ: The amount of items you want to keep in the inventory
gui.banksystem.bank_download_screen.cond: Condition for when items should be downloaded from the bank
The value for the selected condition
Just keep the target amount in the inventory

Only download items from the bank if there is
more than the specified condition value in the bank account

Only download items from the bank if there is
less than the specified condition value in the bank account
message.banksystem.bank_balance_lost: You have lost {amount} {item_name} from your bank account
message.banksystem.problem_while_trying_:
Problem while trying to set balance for {item_name} to {amount}.
Locked balance is {locked_balance} and balance is {balance}.
Balance will be set to 0 and locked balance to {locked_balance}.
Because of that, some limit orders may be cancelled.
message.banksystem.not_enough_to_transfe: {sender} does not have enough {item_name} to transfer {amount} to {receiver}
message.banksystem.not_enough_in_account: {user_name} does not have enough {item_name} in the bank account
message.banksystem.transfer_failed: Failed to transfer {amount} {item_name} from {sender} → {receiver}'s account. Reason: {reason}
message.banksystem.transfer_to_same_acco: Can't transfer {item_name} to the same account, you idiot sandwich
message.banksystem.no_permission_deposit: You don't have the permission to deposit to the account "{account_number}"
message.banksystem.no_permission_withdra: You don't have the permission to withdraw from the account "{account_number}"
message.banksystem.no_permission_manage: You don't have the permission to manage the account "{account_number}"
message.banksystem.bank_user_notificatio: You will now receive notifications when a bank transaction happens
You will no longer receive notifications when a bank transaction happens
message.banksystem.cant_create_bank: Can't create bank for {user_name} for item {item_name}
message.banksystem.bank_already_exists: {user_name} already has a bank for item {item_name}
message.banksystem.money_bank_access_hel:
You can access your account using the Bank Terminal block
or the /bank command.
message.banksystem.deposit_rejected_item: The condition of {item_name} prevents banking it
message.banksystem.item_not_allowed: {item_name} is not allowed to be stored in the bank
message.banksystem.item_now_allowed:
{item_name} is now allowed to be stored in the bank.
The smallest unit of this item that can be stored in the bank is {amount}.
message.banksystem.item_already_allowed: {item_name} is already allowed to be stored in the bank, you idiot sandwich
message.banksystem.bank_setting_start_ba: The players money start balance is set to {amount}
message.banksystem.bank_setting_item_tra: The item transfer tick interval is set to {amount}
message.banksystem.need_creative_mode_fo: You need to be in creative mode to access this screen
gui.banksystem.atm_screen.not_enough_mon: You do not have enough money in the bank to withdraw {amount}
